content:
graph TD
    A[Intermittent Fasting Safety Profile]
    A --> B[Common Adverse Effects]
    A --> C[Serious Concerns]
    A --> D[Absolute Contraindications]
    A --> E[Vulnerable Populations]
    B --> B1[Headache, Fatigue, Dizziness, Irritability]
    C --> C1[Hypoglycemia, Electrolyte Disturbance, Gallstones]
    D --> D1[Pregnancy, Eating Disorders, Type 1 Diabetes]
    E --> E1[Children, Frail Older Adults, Low BMI]
